title: Fix: Hey set an alarm for 7:30 tomorrow morni
goal: Command 'Hey set an alarm for 7:30 tomorrow morning' failed with: The news request failed entirely with a missing-text error and gave the user no summaries at all.. Suggestion: Fetch current news headlines from a reliable news source, summarize three items directly, and only use AI after the retrieval step succeeds.

test_requirements.case: route and execute 'Hey set an alarm for 7:30 tomo...'
